gpt_comment: ⚠️[DIVERGENT]: There is a disagreement, but it is not clear due to missing data. Meteoblue reports a high of 19°C, which is significantly above the baseline's 7°C, but does not provide rain data. The other sources, YR.no and Météo France, could not provide any data. It seems like a warm day in Paris, maybe a good day to watch the bumblebees in Jardin du Luxembourg.
